meaning: n.[动]刺豚鼠,刺豚鼠皮毛上的深浅环纹
examples: The agouti colour does not occur in the Border Collie as far as I know.
Any of various similar or related rodents, such as the capybara, coypu, and agouti.
The most well known example is that of the Agouti mice: they are yellow, fat and are prone to diabetes and cancer.
They also followed the movements of 16 clearly identifiable agoutis, and monitored 154 agouti caches with remote cameras for a year.
